main.description: Full product page with media gallery, variant picker, and purchase flow

blocks.media_gallery: 4-image carousel with thumbnails numbered 01-04, zoom capability
blocks.variant_picker: Size selector (25-34 US sizing), color display, per-size stock status (InStock/OutOfStock)
blocks.pricing: Sale price + compare-at price, stock messaging ('1 restant')

product_description_qDz6W8.description: Extended product description with marketing copy. Highlights key features, design elements (colored eyelet, M rivet), and versatility messaging.

product_recommendations_NeYqcN.description: 'Vous pourriez aussi aimer :' (You might also like) — related product carousel powered by Shopify recommendations API.
